lakehouse.title: Lakehouse SQL
lakehouse.subtitle: Run SQL queries over Lakehouse data
lakehouse.pill_readonly_tip: Backend uses transaction_read_only = on; any INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE / DDL is rejected
lakehouse.pill_timeout_tip: statement_timeout = 30s; on timeout Postgres aborts and rolls back the transaction
lakehouse.pill_scope_tip: Queries are scoped to the current project's Lakehouse data
lakehouse.schema_empty_hint: Import data on the Lakehouse page first
lakehouse.snippets_empty_hint: Click "Save" above to save the current SQL
lakehouse.editor_hint: chars · select text to run partial query
lakehouse.idle_hint: Press ⌘↵ or click Run to execute
lakehouse.avail_tables: Available tables (click to insert into editor):
lakehouse.empty_result_hint: Query syntax is valid, but no rows matched

passthrough.title: Ontology SQL Pass-through
passthrough.subtitle: Write SELECT statements using Od names as tables and Property names as columns. The server injects canonical_query as a CTE and pushes down to the physical tables.
passthrough.pill_readonly_tip: Backend uses transaction_read_only = on; any INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE / DDL is rejected
passthrough.pill_timeout_tip: statement_timeout = 30s; on timeout Postgres aborts and rolls back the transaction
passthrough.pill_whitelist_tip: FROM / JOIN can only reference Ontology objects with canonical_query configured in this project; DDL keywords are blocked before frontend validation
passthrough.schema_empty: No Ods configured in this project
passthrough.schema_empty_hint: Solidify canonical_query on the Lakehouse Objects page first
passthrough.od_not_queryable: This Od has no canonical_query and cannot be queried directly
passthrough.mc_title: machine code column (use the canonical property name)
passthrough.snippets_empty_hint: Click "Save" above to save the current SQL
passthrough.editor_hint: chars · select text to run partial query
passthrough.idle_hint: Press ⌘↵ or click Run to execute
passthrough.idle_sub: Tables = Od names · Columns = Property names · up to {rowLimit} rows
passthrough.avail_od_hint: Available Ods (click to insert into editor):
passthrough.empty_result_hint: Query syntax is valid, but no rows matched
